ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. Original certificate on page 1, Copy on page 2. Both are identical in content.

invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF with 4 pages, each containing a separate invoice (F 498604, F 498605, F 498606, F 498607) all issued by AB Regin to Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. The certificate references four order numbers (K457481, K456159, K457491, K456923) matching the four invoices.

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The remarks field contains order numbers K457481, K456159, K457491, K456923 — none of which constitute an LC reference. No field labeled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', or 'Documentary Credit' exists.

locations_found: Invoice page 1 footer: 'AB Regin, Box 116, SE-428 22 Kållered, Sweden'
Invoice page 2 footer: 'AB Regin, Box 116, SE-428 22 Kållered, Sweden'
Invoice page 3 footer: 'AB Regin, Box 116, SE-428 22 Kållered, Sweden'
Invoice page 4 footer: 'AB Regin, Box 116, SE-428 22 Kållered, Sweden'

document_pairing.method: Certificate references four order numbers (K457481, K456159, K457491, K456923) in remarks field (box 5). The invoice file contains four invoices with matching order numbers: F 498604 (Order K457481), F 498605 (Order K456159), F 498606 (Order K457491), F 498607 (Order K456923). All four invoices are issued by the same entity (AB Regin) and addressed to the same consignee. The certificate covers all four orders as a single consolidated shipment.
document_pairing.invoice_source: Document B, pages 1-4 (four invoices: F 498604, F 498605, F 498606, F 498607)
document_pairing.sanity_check_details: Criterion 1: Certificate references order numbers K457481, K456159, K457491, K456923 — all four match invoices in Document B. Criterion 2: Certificate consignor 'AB Regin' matches invoice issuer 'AB Regin'. Criterion 3: Certificate consignee 'Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve' matches invoice address 'Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.' At least one criterion met — pairing valid.

consignor.certificate_value: AB Regin, Box 116, SE-428 22, KÅLLERED, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: AB Regin, Box 116, SE-428 22 Kållered, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for 'AB Regin' in all invoice pages
comparison_steps.result: FOUND — 'AB Regin' appears in the footer of all four invoice pages as the issuer: 'AB Regin, Box 116, SE-428 22 Kållered, Sweden'. The company name is identical.
MATCH — Certificate states 'Sweden', invoice footer states 'Sweden'. Additionally, VAT No. SE556414545501 has SE-prefix confirming Sweden.

consignor.motivation: Certificate consignor 'AB Regin' is directly identified as the invoice issuer on all four invoice pages in the footer block. The company name is an exact match. Country is 'Sweden' in both documents, further confirmed by VAT prefix SE.
consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate box 1: 'AB Regin, Box 116, SE-428 22, KÅLLERED, Sweden'. Invoice footer (all pages): 'AB Regin, Box 116, SE-428 22 Kållered, Sweden'. Name: exact match 'AB Regin'. Address: 'Box 116, SE-428 22, KÅLLERED' vs 'Box 116, SE-428 22 Kållered' — only case difference in city name. Country: both 'Sweden'. Rule 4.1.0 satisfied directly.

consignee.certificate_value: Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve, Yesilce Mah. Aytekin Sok. No:2, 4. Levent Eski Oto Sanayi, 34418 Kagithane / Istanbul, Turkey
consignee.invoice_value: Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S., Yesilce Mah. Aytekin Sok. No:2, 4. Levent Eski Oto Sanayi, 34418 Kagithane / Istanbul, Turkey

comparison_steps.description: Invoice has 'Invoice address' field with named party — this is the primary facturation field.
comparison_steps.result: Primary field identified: 'Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.' in Invoice address block.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve' which appears truncated. Full name in invoice is 'Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.'. Certificate text is an exact prefix of the invoice name — it ends mid-phrase after 've' likely due to field width limitation in the certificate form.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH via layout truncation rule. All conditions met: (1) certificate text is exact prefix of invoice name, (2) truncation occurs at end due to layout, (3) no other party with similar name, (4) country matches.

consignee.motivation: Certificate consignee 'Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve' is a layout-truncated prefix of the invoice's 'Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.' The truncation is clearly due to certificate field width limitation (the name cuts off after 've'). Address and country (Turkey) match exactly. Rule 4.2.2.1.1 (layout truncation in certificate) applies — all five conditions met.
consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate box 2 name: 'Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve'. Invoice address: 'Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.' The certificate text 'Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve' is an exact inledande del (prefix) of 'Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.' Missing text 'Ticaret A.S.' = 'Trade Joint Stock Company' in Turkish — a trade/company form designation. The truncation is at the end of the name field, consistent with layout limitation. No other similar party exists. Country Turkey matches. Rule 4.2.2.1.1 satisfied.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate lists part numbers: DR-90S, DTTH, FT60R, PDT75C, TG-IH3/PT1000-90, TTC25, DTV500X-OEM, DTV300X-OEM, MTIC90R, DTV500X-OEM, DTV300X-OEM, RDAS4S-24S, TTC25. Verify each against invoice Part No. columns across all four invoices.
comparison_steps.result: All article numbers match exactly: DR-90S (inv p1), DTTH (inv p1), FT60R (inv p1), PDT75C (inv p1), TG-IH3/PT1000-90 (inv p1), TTC25 (inv p1 and p4), DTV500X-OEM (inv p1 and p2), DTV300X-OEM (inv p1 and p2), MTIC90R (inv p2), RDAS4S-24S (inv p3). All part numbers in certificate are exact matches in invoices.

comparison_steps.description: Verify product descriptions match by comparing identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning for each line.
comparison_steps.result: All descriptions match: 'Well' matches 'Well', 'Temperature/Humidity duct transmitter' matches, 'Mech frost prot therm' matches, 'Differential pressure transmitter' matches, 'Immersion sensor with house' matches, 'Electrical heating controller' matches, 'Differential pressure switch' matches, 'Mechanical capillary thermostat' matches, 'Damper actuator w/ spring' matches.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate has multiple origins (CN, SE, IT, KR). Each article line includes a country code after the description (e.g. 'DR-90S, Well, CN'). This constitutes valid per-article origin assignment per 4.3.7.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH — each article has origin code appended. Country codes are verifiable per article.

goods_description.motivation: All 13 article lines in the certificate have article numbers (Part No.) that can be exactly identified in the invoices. Descriptions are consistent. The certificate uses country codes (CN, SE, IT, KR) appended to each article line, satisfying the mixed-origin per-article requirement in 4.3.7. Invoices provide full descriptions with matching Part No. and descriptions.
goods_description.debug_explanation: Systematic article-by-article verification across four invoices: DR-90S→inv p1 DR-90S ✓, DTTH→inv p1 DTTH ✓, FT60R→inv p1 FT60R ✓, PDT75C→inv p1 PDT75C ✓, TG-IH3/PT1000-90→inv p1 TG-IH3/PT1000-90 ✓, TTC25→inv p1 TTC25 (qty 15) ✓, DTV500X-OEM→inv p1 DTV500X-OEM (qty 360) ✓, DTV300X-OEM→inv p1 DTV300X-OEM (qty 90) ✓, MTIC90R→inv p2 MTIC90R ✓, DTV500X-OEM→inv p2 DTV500X-OEM (qty 180) ✓, DTV300X-OEM→inv p2 DTV300X-OEM (qty 90) ✓, RDAS4S-24S→inv p3 RDAS4S-24S ✓, TTC25→inv p4 TTC25 (qty 12) ✓. All Part No. exact matches via Prioritet 1.

quantity.certificate_value: DR-90S: 82 | DTTH: 30 | FT60R: 5 | PDT75C: 25 | TG-IH3/PT1000-90: 60 | TTC25: 15 | DTV500X-OEM: 360 | DTV300X-OEM: 90 | MTIC90R: 6 | DTV500X-OEM: 180 | DTV300X-OEM: 90 | RDAS4S-24S: 4 | TTC25: 12
quantity.invoice_value: DR-90S: 82 | DTTH: 30 | FT60R: 5 | PDT75C: 25 | TG-IH3/PT1000-90: 60 | TTC25: 15 | DTV500X-OEM: 360 | DTV300X-OEM: 90 | MTIC90R: 6 | DTV500X-OEM: 180 | DTV300X-OEM: 90 | RDAS4S-24S: 4 | TTC25: 12

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 7 lists quantities per article line: 82, 30, 5, 25, 60, 15, 360, 90, 6, 180, 90, 4, 12. These are individual piece counts per article. Box 6 also mentions '1 pallet, 272 Kg' as packaging info.
comparison_steps.result: Box 7 contains per-article quantities. These are the verification-base quantities. The '1 pallet, 272 Kg' in box 6 is packaging/shipping info.

comparison_steps.description: Verify each quantity from box 7 against corresponding invoice lines across all four invoices.
comparison_steps.result: All quantities match exactly: Invoice p1: DR-90S=82✓, DTTH=30✓, FT60R=5✓, PDT75C=25✓, TG-IH3/PT1000-90=60✓, TTC25=15✓, DTV500X-OEM=360✓, DTV300X-OEM=90✓. Invoice p2: MTIC90R=6✓, DTV500X-OEM=180✓, DTV300X-OEM=90✓. Invoice p3: RDAS4S-24S=4✓. Invoice p4: TTC25=12✓.

quantity.motivation: All 13 quantity values in certificate box 7 can be exactly identified in the corresponding invoice lines. Each article's quantity matches perfectly. The quantities are piece counts without explicit unit in box 7, but the invoices confirm the same numeric values per article line. The certificate does not explicitly state a unit alongside each quantity in box 7, but the quantities per article are identifiable numerically in the invoices. Per 4.4.3, it is sufficient that the numeric value can be identified in the invoice for the corresponding item.
quantity.debug_explanation: Line-by-line verification: Cert DR-90S=82 vs Inv p1 DR-90S Qty=82 ✓ | Cert DTTH=30 vs Inv p1 DTTH Qty=30 ✓ | Cert FT60R=5 vs Inv p1 FT60R Qty=5 ✓ | Cert PDT75C=25 vs Inv p1 PDT75C Qty=25 ✓ | Cert TG-IH3/PT1000-90=60 vs Inv p1 TG-IH3/PT1000-90 Qty=60 ✓ | Cert TTC25=15 vs Inv p1 TTC25 Qty=15 ✓ | Cert DTV500X-OEM=360 vs Inv p1 DTV500X-OEM Qty=360 ✓ | Cert DTV300X-OEM=90 vs Inv p1 DTV300X-OEM Qty=90 ✓ | Cert MTIC90R=6 vs Inv p2 MTIC90R Qty=6 ✓ | Cert DTV500X-OEM=180 vs Inv p2 DTV500X-OEM Qty=180 ✓ | Cert DTV300X-OEM=90 vs Inv p2 DTV300X-OEM Qty=90 ✓ | Cert RDAS4S-24S=4 vs Inv p3 RDAS4S-24S Qty=4 ✓ | Cert TTC25=12 vs Inv p4 TTC25 Qty=12 ✓. All 13 lines verified. No unit was explicitly stated per quantity in box 7 (just numbers), but per 4.4.3 the numeric value matching is sufficient.

country_of_origin.invoice_value: China (DR-90S, TG-IH3/PT1000-90), Sweden (DTTH, PDT75C, TTC25), Italy (FT60R, DTV500X-OEM, DTV300X-OEM, MTIC90R), Korea (RDAS4S-24S)

comparison_steps.result: Invoice origins found: China (DR-90S p1, TG-IH3/PT1000-90 p1), Sweden (DTTH p1, PDT75C p1, TTC25 p1, TTC25 p4), Italy (FT60R p1, DTV500X-OEM p1, DTV300X-OEM p1, MTIC90R p2, DTV500X-OEM p2, DTV300X-OEM p2), Korea (RDAS4S-24S p3).

comparison_steps.result: MATCH — All four origins in certificate are found in invoice: China✓, Sweden✓, Italy✓, Korea✓.

comparison_steps.result: All per-article origins match: DR-90S: cert=CN, inv=China ✓ | DTTH: cert=SE, inv=Sweden ✓ | FT60R: cert=IT, inv=Italy ✓ | PDT75C: cert=SE, inv=Sweden ✓ | TG-IH3/PT1000-90: cert=CN, inv=China ✓ | TTC25: cert=SE, inv=Sweden ✓ | DTV500X-OEM: cert=IT, inv=Italy ✓ | DTV300X-OEM: cert=IT, inv=Italy ✓ | MTIC90R: cert=IT, inv=Italy ✓ | DTV500X-OEM: cert=IT, inv=Italy ✓ | DTV300X-OEM: cert=IT, inv=Italy ✓ | RDAS4S-24S: cert=KR, inv=Korea ✓ | TTC25: cert=SE, inv=Sweden ✓.

country_of_origin.motivation: Certificate lists four countries of origin: China, Sweden, Italy, Korea. All four are explicitly found in the invoices as 'Country of origin' per article. Per-article origin assignment in the certificate (via ISO-like country codes CN, SE, IT, KR) matches exactly with the invoice's per-article origin fields. No discrepancies found.
country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3: 'China, Sweden, Italy, Korea'. Invoice per-article origins: China (2 articles), Sweden (4 articles across 2 invoices), Italy (6 articles across 2 invoices), Korea (1 article). Certificate per-article codes: CN=China, SE=Sweden, IT=Italy, KR=Korea. Each code maps correctly to the invoice's explicit 'Country of origin' field per article line. No additional origins in invoice that are not in certificate. No contradictions.

rule_evaluation_log.motivation: No LC reference found in certificate.

Certificate file contains Original (p1) and Copy (p2) — used Original. Invoice file contains 4 separate invoices (F 498604, F 498605, F 498606, F 498607) with order numbers matching certificate remarks (K457481, K456159, K457491, K456923). All four invoices used as a consolidated set.

Criterion 1: Certificate order refs K457481, K456159, K457491, K456923 match invoice order numbers. Criterion 2: Consignor 'AB Regin' matches invoice issuer. Criterion 3: Consignee matches invoice address. All three criteria met.
AB Regin identified directly as invoice issuer in footer of all pages.
Sweden = Sweden. Confirmed via VAT prefix SE.
Invoice address field identified as primary facturation field.
Certificate 'Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve' is exact prefix of invoice 'Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.' Layout truncation in certificate evident.
All 13 article numbers from certificate found exactly in invoices.
Certificate assigns country code per article (CN, SE, IT, KR). All match invoice per-article Country of origin.
All 13 per-article quantities from box 7 exactly match invoice Qty values.
All four origins (China, Sweden, Italy, Korea) explicitly found in invoices per article.
Per-article origin assignment verified. No discrepancies.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Consignee name mismatch due to missing 'Ticaret A.S.' in certificate
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Certificate name 'Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve' is an exact prefix of invoice's full name 'Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.' This is clearly a layout truncation per rule 4.2.2.1.1. The name cuts off after 've' due to certificate form field width limitation. All five conditions for layout truncation are met.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Certificate does not specify invoice numbers — multiple invoices issue per 8.5.1
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Rule 8.5.1 applies when the certificate does NOT refer to a specific identifier that entydigt identifies the invoices. Here, the certificate remarks (box 5) list four order numbers: K457481, K456159, K457491, K456923. Each of the four invoices bears one of these order numbers as 'Order No.' This provides unambiguous identification of all four invoices as part of this certificate's coverage. Additionally, all four invoices are from the same issuer (AB Regin) to the same consignee, consistent with one consolidated shipment.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Quantity unit missing in certificate box 7 — MISMATCH per 4.4.2
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Box 7 lists individual numeric quantities per article line (82, 30, 5, etc.) without an explicit unit label. However, per 4.4.3, verification requires that 'the numeric value that is stated in the certificate can be identified in the invoice.' All numeric values match exactly. The certificate box 6 states '1 pallet, 272 Kg' indicating a packaging/weight context, while box 7 quantities clearly correspond to piece counts visible in invoices. The per-line numeric identification is sufficient per 4.4.3.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Samtliga kontrollpunkter överensstämmer. Avsändaren AB Regin i Sverige bekräftas som fakturautställare. Mottagaren Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve i Turkiet identifieras i fakturans adressfält (med tillägg av 'Ticaret A.S.' som bedöms vara layoutavkortning i certifikatet). Alla 13 artikelrader med artikelnummer, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland (Kina, Sverige, Italien, Korea) matchar exakt mellan certifikatet och de fyra fakturorna.
non_blocking_notes: Certificate consignee name appears layout-truncated: 'Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve' vs full name 'Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.' — accepted per rule 4.2.2.1.1.
Certificate covers four separate invoices (F 498604–F 498607) identified via order numbers in remarks field.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot faktura

sections.certificate_value: AB Regin, Box 116, SE-428 22, KÅLLERED, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: AB Regin, Box 116, SE-428 22 Kållered, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Direkt identifiering — consignor AB Regin identifieras som fakturautställare i sidfoten på samtliga fyra fakturasidor. Land Sverige bekräftas via adress och VAT-prefix SE.
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'AB Regin' är identiskt i certifikat och faktura. Adressen 'Box 116, SE-428 22 Kållered, Sweden' matchar med enbart versalskillnad i ortsnamn. Land Sverige bekräftat.

sections.certificate_value: Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve, Yesilce Mah. Aytekin Sok. No:2, 4. Levent Eski Oto Sanayi, 34418 Kagithane / Istanbul, Turkey
sections.invoice_value: Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S., Yesilce Mah. Aytekin Sok. No:2, 4. Levent Eski Oto Sanayi, 34418 Kagithane / Istanbul, Turkey
sections.rule_applied: Layoutavkortning i certifikatet — certifikatets 'Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve' utgör en exakt inledande del av fakturans 'Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.' Avkortningen beror på certifikatets fältbegränsning.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagarnamn slutar efter 've' — uppenbar layoutavkortning. Fullständiga namnet i fakturan bekräftar samma företag. Adress och land (Turkiet) matchar exakt.

sections.certificate_value: 13 artikelrader med artikelnummer: DR-90S, DTTH, FT60R, PDT75C, TG-IH3/PT1000-90, TTC25, DTV500X-OEM, DTV300X-OEM, MTIC90R, DTV500X-OEM, DTV300X-OEM, RDAS4S-24S, TTC25
sections.invoice_value: Samma 13 artikelnummer fördelade över fyra fakturor med matchande beskrivningar
sections.rule_applied: Artikelnummermatchning (Prioritet 1) — alla 13 artikelnummer i certifikatet identifieras exakt i fakturorna.
sections.motivation: Samtliga artikelnummer matchar exakt mellan certifikat och fakturor. Varubeskrivningar är konsistenta. Per-artikel ursprungstilldelning via landskoder (CN, SE, IT, KR) verifierad mot fakturans Country of origin-fält.

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll — varje numeriskt värde i certifikatets box 7 identifieras exakt i fakturans Qty-kolumn för motsvarande artikel.
sections.motivation: Alla 13 kvantitetsvärden i certifikatets box 7 matchar exakt mot fakturornas Qty-kolumner. Inga avvikelser.

sections.invoice_value: China (DR-90S, TG-IH3/PT1000-90), Sweden (DTTH, PDT75C, TTC25×2), Italy (FT60R, DTV500X-OEM×2, DTV300X-OEM×2, MTIC90R), Korea (RDAS4S-24S)
sections.rule_applied: Alla fyra ursprungsländer i certifikatet kan uttryckligen identifieras i fakturornas per-artikel Country of origin-fält. Per-artikel ursprungstilldelning matchar.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets fyra ursprungsländer (Kina, Sverige, Italien, Korea) återfinns alla explicit i fakturorna. Per-artikel landskoder i certifikatet (CN, SE, IT, KR) matchar fakturans per-artikel origin-fält utan undantag.

output_quality_checks.consistency_check_details: All 5 checkpoints have status MATCH. No MISMATCH found. comparison_result = IDENTICAL is consistent. All motivations align with their respective statuses. Confidence floor check: lowest confidence is 0.95 (consignee) which is ≥ 0.85 — no MANUAL_REVIEW trigger.
